The feature you need is the only one we built.

Single-purpose apps for individuals and teams, obsessed with solving one problem exceptionally well.

See it in Action See How it Works

We hate bloated apps too.

Endless menus, features you'll never touch, confusing screens. We've all been there. That's why BCube Tech focuses on doing one thing exceptionally well. Leaving you a little more time to breathe and finally feel like your tools work.

Built for relief, crafted for control

One challenge focus

Each app tackles one challenge, not fifty half-baked features.

Clean interfaces

Clean, intuitive interfaces guide every tap, swipe, or click.

Smooth task flow

Tasks flow smoothly, letting you stay focused and in control.

All culminating in that quiet moment of satisfaction. "Finally," you say. "Tools that actually work."

A small collection of mighty apps

Lawh — Instant Quran Recognition

Instant Recognition

Hear any verse and instantly see the Arabic text, transliteration, and translation. No matter the recitation style.

Real time flow

Recognize and identify Quran recitations in real time. No need to pause or rewind.

Intuitive search

Find any verse or surah quickly with an intuitive search.

Read and share

Read the entire Quran seamlessly, or share meaningful verses with loved ones.

Stay present

Every interaction keeps you in sync with your recitation, so you can focus, reflect, and feel the moment fully.

Try Lawh for free

Your next favorite app is almost here.

We're inviting a small group to experience our products before the world does. Use it for free. And if you'd like, help us polish the final details before launch day.

Questions We Know You're Thinking

BCube is a product studio that builds apps. Each one tackles one problem exceptionally well, with interfaces that feel natural, tasks that flow effortlessly, and solutions that work.

Easy. Join the early access list (the VIP group). We'll let you in before launch so you can try it free and even help shape it if you want.

Completely. Early access costs zero dollars. You simply get the perks of being early, clarity, focus, and bragging rights.

Nope. You can quietly explore, or you can give feedback, optional either way. Think of it as VIP access with zero homework.

Soon. Early access members go first. You'll get updates straight to your inbox so you know exactly when the apps are ready for the wider world.

Questions? Ideas? We're listening.

Drop us a note, a thought, or an idea. We read everything and respond within 48 hours.
